title: hieracium murorum subsp. subamoeniflorum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. subamoeniflorum, a lesser-known species within the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. subamoeniflorum are said to include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
